name: should use default from table when sorting by fantasy points from plays that is not in selected columns
description: Regression test: sorting by player_fantasy_points_from_plays without selecting it as a column should fall back to the default player FROM table instead of referencing an undefined CTE. Previously, the FROM table optimization would generate a CTE table alias but the CTE WITH clause was never added because the column was not in the selected columns.
expected_query: with "t38b69b711bb8391bda47f1931d644e31" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2025) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "rate_aggregate_c2d13acd4454" as materialized (select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS m_41e9363e3c4e from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2025) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.psr_pid) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_c2d13acd4454.m_41e9363e3c4e) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t38b69b711bb8391bda47f1931d644e31.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS pass_atts_from_plays_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2025 left join "t38b69b711bb8391bda47f1931d644e31" on "t38b69b711bb8391bda47f1931d644e31"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" left join "rate_aggregate_c2d13acd4454" on "rate_aggregate_c2d13acd4454"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('QB') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
